name: legacyClient
doc_comment:
@deprecated Use `createClient({ baseUrl })` directly. Kept as a fixture for
`deprecated-symbols` + `--format sarif` / `--format annotations` recipes.

name: now
doc_comment:
@deprecated Use `Date.now()` directly. Kept as a fixture for the
`deprecated-symbols` recipe golden test.

name: epochMs
doc_comment:
@deprecated Drift detector for the SARIF / GH-annotations golden output.
Pair with `now()` in `./date.ts` to give recipes >1 row to render.
